UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing level, XP, completed tracks, and minted badges keyed by wallet address

username.description: Lofi nickname chosen by the explorer

xp.description: Total XP earned across study sessions

level.description: Calculated level based on XP values

claimedWelcomeXP.description: Whether the welcome bonus was claimed

mintedBadges.description: List of minted badges stored in the user Kiosk

lastLoginDate.description: YYYY-MM-DD format of last study login

loginDates.description: Logged date strings in YYYY-MM-DD format

yetiHighScore.description: Verified maximum consensus arcade game score reached by user

yetiGamesPlayed.description: Total number of completed validation arcade starts for this user

/users/{walletAddress}.description: Student profiles of Sui Lofi Academy tracked by connected SUI wallets
